body_excerpt: In ss_AnalyzeOssReturnResUssdArgIe of ss_OssAsnManagement.c, there is a possible out of bounds read due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
